since_last: 14% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.29%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 14% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -2.56% · Gold -1.12% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 14% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.29%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.29%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at -8.53%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +5.48%, SAP +3.25%, NOW +1.52%, MSFT +1.40%, WDAY +1.39%. Laggards: MRVL -8.53%, MU -8.08%, AMAT -7.84%, ASML -7.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.78% at $153.39
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
